case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. GRANITE STATE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GRANITE STATE INSURANCE COMPANY H & H BAIL BONDS
